title: Finally… A NotebookLM Alternative With an API
summary: Open Notebook is a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM that enables developers to build AI workflows with private documents, code, and research. It supports grounded question-answering and podcast generation from source materials and offers an API for integration.
writeup: The video covers Open Notebook, a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM aimed at developers who want to build AI workflows over private documents, code, and research. It matters because Open Notebook ships an API for integration, addressing a gap NotebookLM leaves for programmatic use and self-hosting. The concrete takeaways: grounded question-answering against source materials, podcast generation from those sources, and full self-hosting for data control.
